js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");let url;if(cate=="/"){url=env.baseUrl;}else if(cate=="week"){url=`${env.baseUrl}/label/week.html`;}else{url=`${env.baseUrl}/vodtype/${cate}-page-${page}.html`;}const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));return $(".stui-vodlist__box").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".stui-vodlist__thumb");const id=a.attr("href")??"";const cover=a.attr("data-original")??"";const title=a.attr("title")??"";const remark=$(item).find(".pic-text").text().trim();return{id,title,cover,remark}});
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));const desc=$(".detail p").text().trim();const tabs=$(".nav-tabs a").toArray().map(t=>$(t).text().trim());const playlist=$(".tab-pane").toArray().map((b,i)=>{const v=$(b).find("li a").toArray().map(a=>({id:a.attr("href"),text:$(a).text().trim()}));return{title:tabs[i],videos:v}});return{desc,playlist};
